WX Founder

SKU: AC6FND04
Regular price $150.00
Style:
Matte Black and Tan Frame with CAPTIVATE™ Tungsten Mirror (Non-Polarized) Lenses

In Stock. Ships within 1 Business Day

30-Day Returns

Your satisfaction is our priority

Lifetime Warranty

We Cover Material & Workmanship Defects

Share
Facebook
Twitter
Pinterest

Product Details

WX Founder

Designed to honor Wiley X's pioneering founder while providing advanced eye protection, the WX Founder will become your new favorite accessory. With maximum eye protection and a bold, standout silhouette, the WX Founder sunglasses are perfect for anyone who wants to make a statement while seeing clearly and safely. The robust build and removable side shields make them ideal for outdoor adventures or casual everyday wear.

Benefits
  • Protect your eyes
    Enjoy worry-free outdoor adventures with 100% UVA/UVB protection, safeguarding your eyes from harmful rays wherever you go.
  • All-Day Comfort
    Feel the difference of lightweight frames, crafted to stay comfortable during long hours on the job or at play.
  • Prescription Ready
    Perfectly tailored to you: Our prescription-ready lenses combine style with the clarity you need for every moment.

Features
  • Series
    A flatter 6-base lens profile
  • Permanent and Removable Side Shields
    Easily snap into place to meet ANSI Z87.1+ Safety Standards
  • Shatterproof Selenite™ Polycarbonate Lenses
    Unmatched durability and impact resistance
  • Dual-Injected Rubber Temples
    Ensure these frames stay put
  • Triloid™ Nylon Frame
    The toughest non-metal material available

Safety Standards 
  • ANSI Z87.1+ High mass/high velocity impact protection

Fit and Measurements

Fit (Head Size):

  • Medium
  • Large

Bridge Size (mm): 17

Lens Width (mm): 56

Lens Height (mm): 44

Temple Length (mm): 135

Included

What's in the box

WX Founder

ANSI Z87.1+ Side Shields

Microfiber Drawstring Bag

I absolutely love them. They
I absolutely love them. They fit my face perfectly and look even better! They’re durable and provide full protection of my eyes. I arms of the glasses are durable. I don’t think I’ll have to replace these for a while.

The shades lack UV protection
The shades lack UV protection and so strong sunlight passed through kind of easily. Frame was a little narrow and small despite the founders being advertised as medium - large.

They have been great so
They have been great so far. A slight issue w/the prescription. The lenses are larger than I originally thought, so I have to move head more when using a computer. For every day use and at the range they have been outstanding. Next time I will get a ...
